entry.title: [ES!] 2016-2019 Shinobu Sengoku Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Translation
310mc
Era
ES! (2016–2019)
Birthday Quote 2016 Umm… Today is my birthday. Ermm… I thought it would be best to let my lord know…
2017 I'm so deeply touched, ahaha~! My lord's passionate words of celebration have carved a place in my heart!
2018 What’s this?! Is this to celebrate my birthday? I am truly grateful to have my birthday celebrated like this~♪
2019 Thank you for celebrating my birthday! Ninjas are typically the supporting character, but for today, I shall act as the main lead!
Birthday Greeting Uuu… sobs… This is the very first time I have ever had such a wonderful, amazing time on my birthday~!
Birthday Course 1/3
Umm, ermm… Transfer student-dono~? Ah—! I-It really is you! What a coincidence to meet you here~♪ A-Ah, n-no, no. I just so happened to come across you on my way back from Isara-dono~!
Oh, okay.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
I-Indeed~! There's nothing I came to you for~ Ahahaha…☆ Mm? Did I really come to see Isara-dono? Class B is in a different room right now, so they wouldn't be in their class…?
A-Awawawa! I-I do not know how to get myself out of these situations~! Help me, Isara-dono~!
Ahh, wait! Don't go~! Huh? You were just joking? You know that my birthday is today…?
T-Transfer student-dono… No, my goddess! Your smile is so bright that I could cry~!
Don't you have something for me?
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Eep!? I-I don't have anything, though!? I really just so happened to bump into you~! I-I definitely am not thinking of letting you know what today is, okay~!?
H-How did you figure it out!? You truly are incredible, Transfer student-dono…! The truth is, um… There's something I wanted to let you know, ermm, umm… Mm? Today's my birthday? A-Are you a mind-reader, Transfer student-dono!?
2/3
Ehehe, actually, today is my birthday… Ah! I-It's not that I want you to celebrate it with me! Umm, I just… I just wanted to say it…♪
Thank you for letting me know.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
W-Why are you thanking me!? You didn't ask me, I was the one who brought it up, right~? Wawa, what is it!? Please don't ruffle my hair~!
Ehehe, I feel so satisfied now after saying what I wanted to say~! Heh, heh~♪ Wait, is that Kanzaki-dono over there? Oh, so you and Kanzaki-dono are in the same class! Aalright then, I shall take this opportunity to tell Kanzaki-dono, as well! Heey, Kanzaki-dono~! ☆
What about everyone in Ryuseitai?
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Ryuseitai? Nihihi, maybe I will tell them later…♪ There is no real deep meaning to it — I simply just thought of you first… W-Wait, is it just me, or did I say something really embarrassing just now~!?
I-I can't tell them that~! Although, I have a feeling they would celebrate my birthday to an overwhelming level… Particularly Taichou-dono… But I don't even know how to tell them it's my birthday! I can tell them like this? …Wah! Don't use this as an opening to squeeze my cheeks~!
3/3
T-Tetora-kun! Midori-kun! Stop~! What did I ever do to…you…? Transfer student-dono? Wait, there's Taichou-dono and Shinkai-dono… And even Isara-dono, Kanzaki-dono, and my seniors from the Broadcast Committee!? Um… I was kidnapped by Tetora-kun and Midori-kun, and forcibly brought here…
Did we surprise you?
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
I-Is this what the world calls a "surprise party"!? This… This is the very first time anyone's ever done this for me… Uu… Uwaaaah, Transfer student-dono~! I love you all, every one of youuuuu…!
A-Am I dreaming!? Mm, it doesn't hurt when I pinch my cheeks… Ouch! Stop, Transfer student-dono! Why did you chop me!? Uu, it was as strong as Shinkai-dono's chops… It hurts, but now I know this isn't a dream…♪
Happy birthday!
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Fwah!? D…Did everyone come here to celebrate my birthday?
Uuu… I… I thought that Tetora-kun and Midori-kun held a grudge against me… Uu… Uwaaaaaaaah~! I'm so, so happy, I can't stop cryiiiinngggg…!!
Eeep!? Something just flew by me… A shuriken? Today's a special day? Everyone will spend time with me until I'm satisfied, whether it be ninja play or ninja talk…?
Really!? Woohoo, this is the best! Nin, nin, let's nin-ninn~! ♪
Birthday Story Chiaki Sengokuuuuuuu!! Happy birthdaaaaaaaay!! Ha ha ha!! ☆ Was I too loud? My bad, my bad! Forgive me! This is the happiest day of the year for you. I had to show my feelings somehow. Hm? You understand how I feel pretty well by now, so I should relax? I see, I see! Thank you, Sengoku! Happy birthday, Sengoku! I'll keep saying it some more! Happy birthday, Sengoku! No, it's still not enough! Let me hug you as well…☆
Midori Hey, Sengoku-kun… Um, could you please stop crying…? Ah, yeah… I know you're not crying 'cause you're sad… But I'm not sure what to do when I see someone crying, so, like…… Uuu, now I feel like crying… Ah no, um, you don't have to force yourself to smile, either… Sigh, this is tough… Ahh, that's right, I didn't properly say it to you yet… Happy birthday, Sengoku-kun. Keep being the same you…♪
Tetora Sengoku-kun! I'm real sorry for freaking you out earlier! I mean, of course you'd be surprised if you were being kidnapped all'a sudden… But see, Midori-kun and I were trying our hardest to make sure you don't find out 'bout the surprise… And we could've spilled the beans if we spoke a single word, so we kept our mouths shut the whole time. That was way harder to accomplish than expected, though… 'Cuz like, you kept begging for help and apologizing over and over… We felt really bad for doing that to you… I know this is dumb to say after everythin' we did to you today, but please trust us a li'l more. You're our comrade, after all. Yep, our comrade! ♪ I'm so glad we got to celebrate your birthday! So once again, happy birthday, Sengoku-kun!
Kanata shinobu~ happy [birthday]…♪ i missed my chance to give you your [present], so could you take it now? it is a [dvd] about [octopuses]. yes, it is a [special] video that showcases [octopuses] the whooole time~♪ [octopuses] are said to be the [ninjas] of the [ocean], you see. i am sure this [dvd] will come in [handy] to you. ehehe, we had fun being [ninjas] together today, didn't we? ♪ let's do it again some other time. yes, i [promise] you we will~♪
Mao Sengoku, happy birthday~♪ The party was fun. I'm really thankful I got to join in, as well. Hmm? You wanted me to celebrate your birthday, so you're really happy I came? Huh, that's great then. You're always helping me out, so if there's anything else I could do for you, just tell me. …You want me to pat your head? You sure? You seemed the type who didn't like that… But well, if that's what you want. There, there, (pat, pat)… Let's keep getting along with each other~♪
Souma Sengoku. …Is Sengoku here? Haha, there you are. You truly are a ninja — You are getting a lot better at hiding your presence. Hm? You like what I said just now? It sounded like you are serving a lord…? I see, you sound excited after having fun being a ninja with everyone in the party, do you not? Good, very good. It is your birthday, after all. Be it ninja or lord, I will become anything for you today. Happy birthday, Sengoku! Ahh, what a blissful day! Wonderful, simply wonderful…♪
Nazuna Happy birthday, Shinobun. I'm so glad I got to celebrate your birthday~♪ You're aaalways talking about how shy you are, so I was really worried for you… But I was relieved to see this many people rushing to say happy birthday to you… I even talked about it with Mako-chin. Of course, if you've ever got a problem, you can always rely on your seniors in the Broadcast Committee, 'kay~? I hope we get to make some great memories in the committee. Like celebrating each other's birthdays, or going out together somewhere~♪ Ahaha, if you're happy, then so am I. Happy birthday! ☆
Yuuta Shinobu-kun! Happy birthday, nin nin…♪ Ahaha, woops, I copied you. I just wanted to try saying it once. I mean, you always look so happy whenever you're talking about ninjas, y'know? Talk to me about all kinds of things, okay? I want to know more about what my friends like, and it's good to know for presents. Hm? Yeah, I did say “friend” right now. Of course it's about you, Shinobu-kun! You're a precious friend to me, so let's keep getting along with each other~♪
Birthday Present
When gifting Shinobu a flower box… Anzu-dono, thank you for celebrating my birthday! These flowers are beautiful~♪ I, too, shall blossom in full glory, just like these flowers! So please cheer for me, Anzu-dono!
Birthday Cake
Chocolate Cake (HAPPY)
Huooo!! Chocolate cake!! Thank you for remembering what I love most~♪
Fruit Tart (GOOD)
Um, I would like to eat this with everyone, if that's okay. The more the merrier! Eating this together will make it even tastier~♪
Shortcake (OK)
The shortcake looks tasty, too… Hmm, I'm not sure what to eat now…
Birthday Motion
Birthday Skill: Today is Shinobu’s birthday. Dreaming of the day he becomes a true ninja, “I shall do my best today, as well!” Birthday Story Directory

2020 Birthday Content

entry.title: [ES!!] 2020 Shinobu Sengoku Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Yuumasu
Translation
310mc
Era
ES!! 2020
Birthday Quote
A-A birthday present for me!? Yaaay~! ♪ I feel blessed to have so many wonderful things happen to me today~!
Party at the Agency 1/3
Producer-dono, I'm sorry to have kept you waiting~♪ Ah—! There are so many tasty food here! I made sure to come with an empty stomach for my party, so I'm excited to dig in~
Would you like to have a bite?
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Mm, I will hold off on eating anything for now. You prepared so much for me, did you not? So I will wait until the party starts. I appreciate the sentiment! Thank you, Producer-dono.
There are some small cream puffs as spare, so I can eat those? Very well, if you say so… (chew, chew)… Mm, it's sweet! It's so tasty and creamy~♪
You can't eat it yet.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Don't worry! I won't touch any of it yet. However, I feel even hungrier from the tasty smell… I shall train myself a little by running up and down the stairs, so that I avoid nibbling on the food!
I'm aware! I'll be sure to wait! Hm, I've never seen some of these foods before… I wonder how they taste…? Ehehe, I cannot wait for my birthday party to start~♪
2/3 Producer-dono! There's something I'd like to ask you! This small cake is in the shape of a shuriken, correct? Ah, you prepared it just for me? I'm so touched~♪
Actually, about this cake…
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
What!? It's made in the shape of a real shuriken!? Does that mean you can make one in the shape of an octagonal shuriken!? Hm, I see… There are far too many sharp edges, so it will be difficult to cut it cleanly to be that shape… That is a bit of a shame, but there's nothing we can do about it.
Producer-dono, you made it…!? Mayoi-dono was the one to suggest it…? As expected from a member of the Ninja Association, he truly understands whats best~! ♪ I would like to eat the cake with Mayoi-dono, as fellow ninja lovers. I will go ask him right away!
Was it tasty?
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Mhm! I shared a few slices with Tetora-kun and Midori-kun, as well! The chocolate on the outside and the sourness of the strawberries inside match perfectly! It was super tasty~!
Ah, I haven't tried it yet. But I'm sure it's tasty~♪ Tetora-kun looked so happy eating it, after all!
3/3 Producer-dono, my birthday party is about to come to an end… I had so much fun, so it's a little saddening… I wish it wouldn't have to end…
There are other birthday parties this month…
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Ah yes, it was Mayoi-dono's birthday party just the other day… It surprised how he was physically so close to me, but I was glad to see him having fun. I would like to celebrate his birthday next year as well, as his Chief! ♪
Ah, that's right, Tetora-kun's birthday is next week! I already prepared a present for him~♪ Are you curious to know what it is? Heh, I'd never spill a secret like that, not even to you, Producer-dono! You will have to wait for the surprise along with Tetora-kun~♪
How about we do another tomorrow?
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Mm? Tomorrow is not my birthday, so I feel as though it would be too strange to do that. I will simply wait for my turn next year! Thank you very much for today, Producer-dono!
Is that really alright!? Yaaay! ♪ …However! It is not my birthday tomorrow, and I am satisfied enough with having my birthday celebrated today. I will use the joy of today to fuel me in my idol activities, starting from tomorrow~!
Birthday Story With Chiaki Sengoku~! Happy birthday! We only get to celebrate your birthday once a year! And so! Leap into my arms; let's have a passionate hug!
Ahaha, it is a little embarrassing to do that in front of everyone, but…! Here I go! Squeeze~
Ohh! You've got more muscle than before! I'm so happy to know you're growing stronger by the minute! I'm excited to see how else you'll grow! ♪
Ehehe, I'm still nowhere near your level, Morisawa-dono, but as a member of Ryuseitai, I will continue to devote myself to training~♪
With Kanata shinobu~ happy [birthday]…♪ i have a [present] for you, may i give it to you? they are [biscuits] in the shape of many [fish]. they are tasty and full of [calcium]~♪
Woahhh~! There are all kinds of fish here! They're so cute~♪ I shall nibble on them during my training! I truly appreciate this, Shinkai-dono~♪
ufufu…♪ i am so glad you like it. work hard on your [training] until you grow as big as a [whale], okay~?
With Tetora Shinobu-kun, happy birthday! Um… I know I shouldn't ask this right now, but don'tcha feel like there's a ghost in here? I keep hearing a strange laugh, and whenever I feel someone passing behind me, I look back to see nobody there…?
Hm. I believe that would be Mayoi-dono. He's proficient at being stealthy! ♪
Ah, so sorry then, I got the wrong idea! I'm glad to know it wasn't a ghost for real.
Ehehe, I'm so happy to know so many of my friends came to my party! ♪
With Midori Shinobu-kun, happy birthday… Our greengrocer store has been selling veggie cookies lately, so I brought a few… But then I found out Shinkai-senpai brought a similar present, so I dunno if I should give them to you anymore…
Whaa, why do you say that!? What matters is those feelings behind the present! You're completely welcome to give me your present, Midori-kun! I'd like to see it!
O-Okay, okay, you can calm down… Here you go. Happy birthday, Shinobu-kun…♪
With Mayoi Shinobu-kyu—… Chief, happy birthdaaayyyyy!!
Mayoi-dono! You came! I'm so glad! ♪
Indeed I did! Today is a very special day, when the adorable life known as Chief came to this world! If only I could celebrate such an important day every day in the yearrr! ☆ I-I sewed a wrapping cloth, just for you, Chief… W-Would you please accept these feelings of miiinneee!?
Ohh, they are the perfect size to wrap my hyorogan food! Thank you, Mayoi-dono~♪
Birthday Cake Interactions List of office interactions that appear when the specified character gifts a present to Shinobu.
It's your birthday! We have to make your party a big one!
I feel as though it's big enough!
here you go, this present is for you.
I'm overjoyed with gratitude, Shinkai-dono! ♪
I chose somethin' just for ya!
I wonder what's inside? I cannot wait to find out!
Happy birthday, Shinobu-kun. Thanks for everything you do for us.
It makes me so happy to hear a "happy birthday" from a friend!
I'm so blessed to have met you, Chief.
I feel the exact same…♪
Please do accept this present as a token of my appreciation for you.
I'm deeply moved by your kindness, Kanzaki-dono! ♪
You're looking really dignified now, aren't you?
Really!? I'm so happy to hear that!
Let's always be friends, okay?
Nihihi, of course…!
You're always helping me out in our Circle, after all.
It is I who is always in your debt! Let's play a game sometime.
I thought you might like this!
I cannot wait to open it! ♪

entry.title: [ES!!] 2021 Shinobu Sengoku Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Translation
310mc
Era
ES!! 2021
Birthday Quote
Thank you for celebrating my birthday, I'm truly overjoyed with gratitude. …Erm, umm… I-I would love it if you could celebrate my birthday next year, as well…♪
Birthday Event Event Preparations 1/3
Ninja Art: Camouflage Jutsu…☆ —Wah!? Since when were you here, Anzu-dono!? I had no idea you were here — I was just about to conceal myself…! You came to talk to me about the birthday event… Ah, I will have an opportunity to spend my birthday with my fans?
Exactly.
Huoo!! I'm so excited! ♪ I have to make it a fun event for all my fans! Anzu-dono, please allow me to help with the event planning! I shall share my wisdom with you!
Let's make it a big celebration.
Just the thought of my fans celebrating my birthday makes me so happy~♪ …Ah! It's too early to feel that way, isn't it? I shall be sure to make the event into something that everyone can enjoy!
I hope it makes you happy…
Of course it does! Just the mention of it is making me super excited~! Anzu-dono, please let me know all the details…♪
2/3 What do you typically do in a birthday event…? I'd like to know how it was for other idols, so that I may use it as reference. Hm, hm… So fans can ask questions for the question segment… What will my fans ask me~? And there's a request segment, too? I'd like to make sure I can meet their expectations… I wonder what they'll request from me…?
Maybe they'd like to see your ninja arts.
I would love to show my ninja arts! It is one of my objectives to show the beauty of ninjas to everyone! I shall train myself for the event, in the case that I do get a request like that!
Don't overdo it, okay?
Heheh, you worry too much, Anzu-dono. I will be fine! It is an idol's duty to fulfill their fans' dreams~♪
An air-kiss, maybe?
Hmm, indeed, that is a request an idol is often sought for… If that is how I can make my fans happy—! Then I will gladly become a ninja who can perfect an air-kiss…☆
3/3 Anzu-dono, thank you very much for all your help! On my birthday event, I will make sure to not only make my fans smile, but you too, Anzu-dono! …Nihihi! So please do look forward to it~♪
I'm already having a lot of fun now.
You had fun talking to me about the event…? Ehehe, you're going to make me blush~ But I share the same feelings as you. I'm so glad we got to talk a lot, Anzu-dono…♪
I can't wait for the event.
Mhm! I can't hold back my excitement! I hope my fans will feel the same way. I would be so happy if we all shared the same feelings…♪
By the way…
Lunch…? Well, I was thinking of heading to the staff cafeteria after this. Ah, how about we go together? I would love to do a few more final touch-ups for the birthday event with you, Anzu-dono~♪
Opening Speech
Shutatatata… Whoosh! Sengoku Shinobu, whose birthday is today, has made his arrival to his birthday event~! ♪ …Wawa—! Thank you all for the birthday celebrations as soon as I made my appearance~! Just knowing everyone here has come just to celebrate my birthday makes me overjoyed with gratitude~! ♪ However, I am not the type of ninja to simply take without giving. I am a ninja and an idol…! Therefore, I shall make sure to bring happiness to all of you, the same way as you did to me! Nihihi, I hope you all enjoy this event!
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Question Segment Let's start with the Question Segment! Thank you very much for all your questions~! While a ninja is meant to conceal themselves, I personally would like all of you to learn more about my way of life, so I shall answer as many questions as I can~♪ "What sort of cake do you like?" …Hm, hm! What a perfect question for birthdays~ I am happy to announce that I was gifted a cake in the shape of a shuriken! ♪ Despite it's small size, it is shaped intricately to look exactly like one, and it was extremely delicious, too! Next question: "What do you do on the weekends?" Hm… Well, I of course sometimes have idol work on the weekends, but… I went out with my friend Yuuta-kun a few weekends ago! ♪ We had a lot of fun playing in the park~♪
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Request Segment Now then, off to the Request Segment! Thank you for all your requests! I have prepared myself to take on any request for the sake of entertainment, but… I am pleased to say that most of the requests asked to see a ninja art from me! I hope this means many of you are interested in ninjas…♪ Right then, let us begin…! I will rush close to all of you through the Ninja Art: Swift Approach Jutsu! Woosh! Heh~♪ Are you all surprised? I wanted to step down to your seats so that I may see all of you clearly, and finally had the opportunity to do so! Everyone looks happy despite their surprise…! Nihihi, your expressions are enough for me…! ♪
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Surprise Segment Now then, the next segment is… Mm? A staff member has brought over something for me…? It's a scroll! Wait, could there be… writing in this…? What!? Did the audience write all of this!? There are so many messages…! Ah! Even my members from Ryuseitai wrote messages for me! This is Tetora-kun's handwriting, and this is Midori-kun's…♪ "Let's always be friends, okay?", "We're always gonna be with ya!" …Uuu~! Thank you so much…! How could I not be happy with such a wonderful gift!? I wll cherish everyone's feelings deep in my heart!
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Closing Speech Ah—! We're already nearing the end…!? But I wanted to be with everyone for a bit longer~! However, the reason I feel that way is because today was a lot of fun…! Your questions, your requests, your surprise…! Everything made me so, so happy! I feel as though I was the one who enjoyed this the most, though… Have I brought happiness to you all as well, just as I said would? …Mhm, ehehe! I'm so happy to see everyone's smiles. Your smiles are the best gift in the world! ♪ I shall continue to pursue my idol path as a hero-ninja forevermore…♪
Birthday Cake
Click here for the office interactions that appear when a specified character gifts a present to Shinobu. ※ On the day of the idol's birthday, the birthday cake is available to purchase in the office. Birthday Story Directory

entry.title: [ES!!] 2022 Shinobu Sengoku Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Translation
310mc
Era
ES!! 2022
Birthday Quote
Ehehe, thank you very much! ♪ I am truly happy to spend my birthday with you!
Party with Everyone 1/3
You are impeccable as always, Anzu-dono! You prepared such a grand party in such a short amount of time…! Your dexterity shows you, too, have what it takes to be a ninja— Mm? What do you have in your hand?
Could you take it?
Ah, this is a teddy bear. Heheheh, how adorable, it's holding a cookie! ♪ Ohh, I can attach it to my clothes through this pin… Thank you for the lovely present, Anzu-dono!
Could you clip this on your clothes?
I see, so a teddy bear that has my name on it… How elaborate! This acts as proof that I am the main lead of this party, correct? Very well then, I'll clip it on… What do you think? Does it suit me?
2/3
It is difficult to choose from such a tasty assortment of food! ♪ Mm, perhaps I should start with salad, as a starter… Ah, but the food over there looks tasty too, and I'm curious about the drinks~… Anzu-dono, what will you have first?
Hyorogan.
You even prepared hyorogan food!? Mmm, it's true that I cannot ignore such food as a ninja, but… It will make me full… I can take it with me? Very well then, I shall take it with me as a souvenir~♪
Juice.
Hmhm, we are having a feast after all, one must start with a cheers! You're correct as always, Anzu-dono. You prepared an umeboshi drink for me? Ah, I have to drink that, it's my favorite! Right then… Cheers~♪
3/3 Ah—! It's already this late… Unfortunately, we must call it an end here. Once I head back to my room, I plan to sleep after I take a good look at all the presents people brought me. Anzu-dono, thank you very much for preparing this birthday party for me~♪
Did you have fun?
Of course! The proof of that is my smile all throughout the party! It motivated me to work hard and grow more as an idol and ninja! Please do continue supporting me, Anzu-dono~♪
Is there anything you want for your party next year?
Hmm… Well, I feel as though we would have a lot of fun if everyone could be ninjas together, and show off our ninja art… However, I don't particularly have anything I want either way. I'm happy enough just knowing people want to celebrate my birthday~♪
Opening Speech
Ohh! I'm very touched that everyone came here just to celebrate my birthday! While I'd like to start the party right away, allow me to show my gratitude first! Thank you so much for coming over during your busy schedules! I'm so excited to see what sort of party we'll end up having~♪ Right then, it's time to begin!
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Food Talk Shinobu-kun, happy birthday~♪ Let's celebrate; cheers! ♪
Ohh, Yuuta-kun, thank you! Very well then… Cheers~♪
Hm? What're you drinking…? Doesn't seem like the usual flavors you see…?
Anzu-dono brought this for me; it's an umeboshi drink! ♪ She prepared it just for me, as it is my favorite food!
Woah, really? That's really neat, nothing beats your favorite food! Maybe I'll ask her to prepare super spicy food on my birthday, too…♪
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Presents from ES Idols Yo, li'l ninja! Happy birthday! Here's my present for ya~♪
Ahh, really!? I'm grateful to receive a present from you, Rinne-dono. What is it…?
It's a box of board games you can play with a bunch'a people, even in Asobi Club! This took a lot to get, y'know~?
Ohhh~! You went through pains just to get this for me!? I'm in your debt! Is it that rare of an item?
Yeah, for reals. I almost gave up, but luck was on my side right at the brink of death! I hit the big number, y'see~♪
Ah, so it is a gambling prize after all, I see… However, I'm very happy that you won it for me. I'd love to play it with everyone straight away! ♪
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Birthday Wishes from ES Idols Ossu! Happy birthday, Shinobu-kun!
HaHa~ Good evening. Sora would like to celebrate your birthday, too~♪
The both of you came to my birthday as well!? Nihihi, I'm so happy to see so many people here celebrating my birthday~ Let's get along with each other this year, too! ♪
Yes! Let's play around and climb walls together sometime~♪
Oooh~! That sounds like fun! It'd be a great way to train as well, so could I join you guys?
Of course you may! Very well then, let's have a match sometime to see who can climb up the wall the fastest! ♪
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Closing Speech Ah! It's starting to get late… Very well, I hope all of you don't mind if I make my closing speech. I would like to formally thank you all for coming to my birthday party tonight! ♪ It was so much fun having such a big celebration, receiving so many presents, and most of all, playing games with so many people… Tonight was truly amazing! From the bottom of my heart, thank you…♪ I will continue to train hard as an idol and a ninja, so I hope to continue getting along with all of you from now on, as well!
Birthday Special Motion
The special chibi motions for Shinobu are Mayoi and Mao! ※ Special chibi motions show a different expression from the rest of the idols. Birthday Cake

entry.title: [ES!] 2016-2019 Tetora Nagumo Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Translation
310mc
Era
ES! (2016–2019)
Birthday Quote 2016 Today's my birthday! It'd make me real happy to celebrate my birthday with you, Transfer student-san! ♪
2017 Waah! You'll celebrate my birthday!? Kuuuh, I'm so happy! I'm so deeply moved…!
2018 Ossu! Thank you for celebrating my birthday! I think I’ve gotten a li'l closer to becoming a man among men!
2019 Is this present for me!? Thank you so much! I'm so happy to get a present from you, Anego~!
Birthday Greeting Alrighty, I'm all pumped now! I'm gonna keep working harder and harder to boost my "man among men" level~! ☆
Birthday Course 1/3
Ah, Transfer student-san! 'Suup~☆ Look, I got presents from Midori-kun and Sengoku-kun~♪ Ossu! Today's my birthday!
What did you get?
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Umm, I got a mascot cushion called "Kalbidon" from Midori-kun… And a treasured ninja scroll…? From Sengoku-kun! Ahaha, they both picked stuff they like! But I'm super happy~♪
I got different stuff from 'em… Oh! This kalbi beef bowl is also their treat! They ordered a big meal just for my sake… Taishou's lunchboxes are always tasty, but nothing beats a kalbi beef bowl~♪
Happy birthday.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Thank you, Transfer student-san! I'm so happy to hear it from ya~♪ Ahaha, Midori-kun and Sengoku-kun look envious~ Birthdays are so nice! It feels like you're the main character…☆
Ooh…! ☆ I'm happy to hear that from you, Transfer student-san! Mm~ It feels different from when a friend says it to me. How so, you ask? …I'll keep that a secret, if that's okay~♪
2/3
Woah, woah, hold on!! Midori-kun and Sengoku-kun told me that we have Ryuseitai activities after classes, so I came here, but…
Umm… What's this 'bout? "Today's protagonist"…?
Your birthday isn't over yet.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Woah!? I hear a familiar laugh!? Ah, it really is Taichou… And Shinkai-senpai, too!? Why's everyone saying their catchphrases!? No, this isn't the time to be dumbfounded! Ossu! I gotta put my all in my catchphrase, too!
That was a lie, it's actually a birthday party…? T-Then this was all planned… Wait, were you in on it, too, Transfer student-san!? Uu~myu, I didn't notice at all… Everyone's way too good at acting!
Once again, happy birthday!
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Huh? You said happy birthday to me during lunch already, though…? …That was just to keep my guard down? Y-You got me! Ahh, everybody got me good~! Ossu! Thank you, everyone! I'm super moved to have a party like this! ☆
Woah, you surprised me! You even got party poppers? Mm? I'm more calm than you expected? Hehe, maybe it's 'cuz I've been training well…♪ Taishou's always tellin' me to stay calm, after all~
3/3
Thank you so much, Transfer student-san! I heard that you were the one who planned most of this! We all had such a blast! I got to have the best birthday ever~! ☆ Like, I dunno… I even feel like I got one step closer to becoming a man among men!
Yeah, for sure.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Hehe, so you see it that way too, Transfer student-san…♪ I'm gonna keep doing my absolute best, not only as a man but as an idol too! So that I can grow and become reliable! So please keep watching me, always and forever…☆
Ooh, you can tell, Transfer student-san!? Ooohh, I'm so fired up now! I'm gonna improve myself to become more manly! I'll challenge myself with a new workout plan… And maybe carrots, too~… Actually, I think I'll do that when I feel like it. That's fine, right?
I'm so glad.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Kuu~! I'm so happy, I'm shedding manly tears… Woah!? T-Taichou! Don't hug me outta nowhere!
Wait, why're you crying…? Gosh… You're such a handful, aren'tcha~?
Ossu! I want Taishou to see how much I've grown, too—… Mm?
Taishou…!? Huh, huh!? Why's a Taishou-looking guy here!? Waah, waah, it's the real thing! Ahhh, you guys wanna make this the best day of my life that badly, don'tcha~!?
Birthday Story Chiaki Uu… Uuu… You've grown so much, Nagumo! I'm so emotional…! Ah, um, I know you're still growing. But I got hit with emotion when I imagined how much more you're going to grow! I see it before my eyes! Your figure in the future…! You're shining bright and looking reliable alongside Sengoku and Takamine…☆ Oh! Don't turn away with a stunned look! Hahaha! ♪ I won't let you get away~ Happy birthday, Nagumo! Let me hug you lots as celebration! Squeeze squeeze~☆
Midori Happy birthday, Nagumo-kun. Did you like the Kalbidon cushion I gave you…? It's like this kalbi beef bowl mascot was made just for you… I'm glad I found it, 'cause it made it easy to choose a present for you… Hm? It's nice for hugging? Mhm, isn't it, isn't it? And the soft-like feel to its face, and how you can't tell which part of it is meant to be like a kalbi bowl is amazing…☆ Heheheh, I'd be so happy if this cushion gets you more into mascot characters…♪
Shinobu Tetora-kuuun! Happy birthday~♪ You celebrated my birthday the other day, remember? I have been so excited for this day ever since! I was so, so happy when everyone celebrated my birthday… So I wanted to, um… celebrate m-my precious comrade's birthday too… I was worried getting too into it would not work out well, but… Did it make you happy? Ehehe, that is wonderful news. I hope we continue to get along with each other, Tetora-kun…♪
Kanata happy [birthday], tetora. good boy, good boy…♪ oh? do you not [like] people patting your head? ah, so you do not like being [treated] like a [child]. you have become an [adult] now, even though you are still just a [child], fufufu…♪ i am not making [fun] of you~ i think it is just fine that you are like that, it is just like [you]. ufufu, you did not like me [treating] you like a [child] when you have grown a year older, yes? then let's [shake hands] instead. let's keep getting along, okay~…♪
Kuro Yo, Tetsu. I see you're havin' a great time. Li'l Lady told me that they'll hold a birthday party for you, and I was gonna come over to it like everyone else, but then Morisawa told me to wait 'til he gives me the signal, so… I guess they made me join the party in a really flashy way, but… was it really alright for someone like me to be the surprise guest? Ohh? So you were okay with it, huh… Aight, I won't say anythin' else if you're that sure 'bout it. Haha, as long as you're happy, Tetsu. Happy birthday…♪
Tomoya Tetora, happy birthday~♪ It's pretty festive here with your seniors around. I'm really glad I got to come to a party this lively. I should've given it to you earlier, since I bet you have a ton of them by now, but… Um, Hajime and I also got you a present. Could you take it? Yep, it's a bento box. You looked like the type with a big appetite, so we thought you may need a bigger one. Tell the senior who makes bentos for you to make your portions bigger, too~♪
Hajime Happy birthday, Tetora-kun. I'm so, so happy I got to celebrate a friend's birthday like this~♪ Wawa, please don't bow your head down~! I-I want to thank you for everything, too! …Heheh~♪ That's right, both you and I speak politely, don't we? I feel more relaxed speaking politely, but what about you, Tetora-kun? Hehe, I thought so. I think you're fine just like that…♪ Talking like this doesn't mean we're trying to be distant, after all. Let's keep getting along, please~♪
Hinata Hyahoo~! ☆ Happy birthday, Tetsu-kun! Ahaha, whoops, I jumped on you hard! Hmm? I'm too excited? Of course I am, it's your birthday! Tetsu-kun's mooom~ Thanks for giving birth to Tetsu-kun~☆ Let's hype things up even more! How about a match between us two? If we have one with a game you might end up losing hardcore and being sad on your birthday, so we could have one with our fists for today! Heh heh heh… You gotta beat me first if you wanna be a man among men…… Just kidding~♪
Birthday Present
When gifting Tetora a flower box… Anzu-Anego, thank you so much! Hehe! ♪ I don't really get flowers often, so it's a li'l embarrassing~ But it means a lot to me to get flowers from you, Anego. I'll cherish 'em!
Birthday Cake
Chocolate Cake (HAPPY)
There's chocolate all over my mouth? Ahaha, I ate it all up 'cuz it was so tasty. This is pretty embarrassing, please don't look~!
Fruit Tart (GOOD)
You made this too, Anego? Impressive as always! I really respect you~♪
Shortcake (OK)
I could make this too since it's a shortcake, right? I mean, it's not like this could turn charred black, yeah?
Birthday Motion
Birthday Skill: Today is Tetora’s birthday. Chasing after the back of the senior he admires, “I'll do my best with all my energy today, too!” Birthday Story Directory

entry.title: [ES!!] 2023 Shinobu Sengoku Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Translation
310mc
Era
ES!! 2023
Birthday Quote
Nishishi, thank you very much, I appreciate hearing those words from you! ♪ I'd like you to see for yourself how much more I've matured! ♪
Birthday Moment Moment Event 1/3
"Our time together may have been short, but I thank you all for listening to this broadcast! Right then— This was the guest, Sengoku Shinobu, speaking!" Ah— Anzu-dono! Excellent work today! The radio broadcast just finished now! I accomplished my duty as a special birthday guest, you see~♪
Good work.
The truth is… When I was first offered this opportunity, I was not sure if I could manage through the radio. However, I was thankfully worried over nothing! Once it started, I found myself having endless topics to talk about, and had a very wonderful time during the recording~♪
Happy birthday.
Thank you~♪ Ehehe, the letters I got to read today had so many "happy birthday" messages for me! Letters are so nice; you get to appreciate each and every fan's feelings first-hand~♪
2/3 I could even give a gold star for this radio, honestly! ♪ While I am typically the shy type of ninja, I was able to utilize my experience in the Broadcasting Committee! Oh yes, why are you here, Anzu-dono?
I'm here for you.
Wha…!? You came to pick me up for my party…!? Hm, hm, you'd like to have a briefing after the party? Understood!
Do you have time after this?
I see, you'd like to speak to me after the party. Understood! I will always rush to any call from you, Anzu-dono!
3/3 It's about time I left the studio. A special birthday show… This project was truly wonderful~♪ I feel as though I was able to convey my feelings to all my fans. Do you plan to do more of those birthday projects…?
I'd like to.
Ohh! I'm so glad you're up for the idea! I'm curious to know what the others will say on their birthday~♪
As long as our schedule allows us to.
I see… That's true, it is difficult to make sure everyone's schedules align on the day of their birthday. However, if there ever is a radio scheduled for someone's birthday, I will be there to listen to it! ♪
Birthday Night, Part One 1/3
Shutatata…☆ Sengoku Shinobu has made his arrival! Oh…? Anzu-dono isn't here yet… Very well, I shall use my Camouflage Jutsu and hide on this wall—
Huh? Is he still not here…?
Nin-nin! ♪ Anzu-dono, I'm over here! My Camouflage Jutsu was a huge success! Heheh! Don't you think I've improved since the past? I wanted to show off my improved jutsu while I had the opportunity~♪
2/3 Whew, there was a lot to do today, from my birthday party to the radio recording… I was running in and out of the ES building the whole day. I feel like I can finally take a breather…♪
Are you tired?
Nay, I'm not the slightest bit tired! Just the sight of all my birthday cards and presents from everyone fills me to the brim with endless energy! ♪
3/3 There are many kinds of birthday cards lately, it seems. For example, I received a birthday card with a frog design from a fan! Look, this one. The envelope and cover have so many frogs on it~♪
It's cute.
This one on the edge looks similar to Momocchi, and this one on the leaf looks like Thunder! ♪ To think they found this card just for me… I'm truly happy~♪
Birthday Night, Part Two 1/3 Hmhm, so you called me here so that you may give me a birthday present? Ohh, it is concealed in such a cute wrapping! I wonder what's inside…? Can I open it right now?
Yeah, you can.
Right then, if you'll excuse me… Wahh, what a pretty brooch! Did you prepare this for me!? Thank you very much, Anzu-dono!
2/3
Heh, I'm so happy, I could not help myself from clipping it on straight away~♪ You've given me such a lovely present, so I'd like to repay you somehow. You are free to ask anything from me, Anzu-dono~♪
Umm…
Mmm, you cannot think of anything? Or are you perhaps just holding yourself back…? Alright, then on your birthday, I will make sure to gift you something just as wonderful as this brooch, Anzu-dono! ♪
3/3 Today was truly a fulfilling day. A birthday party just for me, presents just for me… I had a wonderful time. I made such wonderful memories today…♪
I'm so glad.
Of course, I'm also happy that I was able to talk to you at our leisure before the day ended! ♪ I will continue to work my hardest this year, so please do watch over me, Anzu-dono!
Birthday Phone Call Producer-dono, thank you for everything that you prepared for me today, I'm overjoyed with gratitude! ♪ Heheh, I hope to be able to spend my birthday with everyone like this next year, just as I did this year…♪
Birthday Cake

entry.title: [ES!!] 2020 Tetora Nagumo Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Yuumasu
Translation
310mc
Era
ES!! 2020
Birthday Quote
You remembered my birthday, Producer!? ♪ Ossu, I'm so thankful! I'll be sure to become a strong man that truly shows I've grown…!
Party at the Agency 1/3
Thank you for making a birthday party for me, Producer! Um, you put a lot of effort into this party, but… You must be real busy with your producer work, so are you sure everything's okay with the preparation?
Don't worry about it.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Gotcha. If that's what you say, Producer… —Wait, you just yawned! I saw it! You haven't been getting enough sleep…! Please make sure to rest properly tonight!
No, please let me help out with preparations for the next birthday party! I'm good at manual labor. I can easily carry the chairs and tables~ Please ask for my help, okay? All for one, and one for all…☆
Preparing is fun, too.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
You really love working, don'tcha? That's fine then, but please don't overwork yourself. …Gosh, don't try to wave it off with a laugh. I'm real worried 'bout you, y'know?
Haha, I get how you feel. Preparations are fun, but the sense of accomplishment after the event is over is amazing, too! I'm so glad to hear you're enjoying yourself, though…♪
2/3 I'm playing Old Maid with Ryuseitai, but… I keep losing! It's so frustrating… Do you have any tips on how to win, Producer?
Don't show any emotion.
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Huh!? They can tell what I'm thinking just by seeing my face? So that was my downfall… No wonder I kept losing. Don't show my emotions… Mmm, the more I put focus on it, the more I overthink it~!
Uu~myu, you sound like Taishou whenever we're training. If I don't show any emotion, they won't be able to tell my expression, right? I'll give it a shot! Ossu!
Luck .
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
I keep losin' 'cuz I always pull the old maid? That's true… But the other members still win when they pull it, so there must be some other reason… I'll keep thinkin' up a way to win on my own!
I need to be lucky… Hmm, so I'm not in luck, huh… …Huh? No, that wasn't me making a joke, though!? Ahaha, well, I'm glad it was funny at least… But it's real embarrassing that I accidentally did a pun…
3/3 I got to have a real fun party thanks to everyone! Ah, that includes you too, 'course! I wanna give all these happy feelings to someone else, too!
You're just itching to do that, huh?
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Ahaha, I was told I don't have to clean anything up since it's my birthday, but… It's just making me more restless. So Producer, please let me help out with the clean-up!
Ossu! I just can't hold back to go all out and do a hero show or live! Hm? There was a job you wanted to tell us 'bout? You're awesome, Producer! All of the Ryuseitai members are here too, so let's go and talk to 'em 'bout it!
You have a lot of presents, don't you?
Possibility 1 Possibility 2
Ahh, this fancy wrapping is a present from Narukami-senpai! You're curious to know what I got? …Actually, I don't wanna ruin this pretty wrapping, so I still dunno what's inside. Narukami-senpai said I don't have to open it immediately since she can hear my thoughts on it in the dorms, so I plan to open it once I get back.
I got presents from a lotta people. Look at this! Taishou gave it to me! Ehehe, he stitched a bag to put my karate uniform in~♪ He apologized that it isn't a typical kinda gift, but I was super happy to get it!
Birthday Story With Chiaki Happy birthday, Nagumo…☆ (arms wide open)
You did the same thing on Shinobu-kun's birthday, didn'tcha…? …Ah, sure, why not.
Ohh!? I didn't expect you to come and hug me…!
We're talkin' 'bout you, after all. You'd totally hug me even if I didn't want it. I'd be better off just bein' a man 'bout it and go for it myself, instead of running away~
Ohh! You really read right through me…! You've grown so much, Nagumo!
With Kanata tetora, happy [birthday]. let's [shake hands]~♪
Mm? I don't mind, but why…?
last year, you said that you did not want to be [treated] as a [child], so i thought you would prefer [handshaking] over a pat on the head. but are you perhaps in the mood to be pat on the head today? that is fine by me~ i will pat you lots, since it is your [birthday]. good boy, good boy~…♪
Ahaha, that wasn't why I asked, but thank you lots anyway, Shinkai-senpai! ♪
With Shinobu Happy birthday, Tetora-kun! Please do accept my present for you~♪
A shuriken…? Wait— This is really heavy…!?
Heh, it is a weight I got just for you, Tetora-kun. If you were to lift it like a dumbbell, you will surely build muscle~♪
Ohh, it has a practical use for it! I'll totally use it whenever I've got the free time~♪
With Midori Why're you sighing, Midori-kun?
I wanna say "happy birthday" to Tetora-kun, but everyone keeps talking to him, so I can't find the right timing to… I'm never gonna be able to say it before the party's over at this rate… I'm so depressed…
Haha, c'mon, no way that's happening! I mean, you just said it to me right now!
Huh? …Wait, you're right. I had my head down, so I didn't realize I was talking to you, Tetora-kun. But I should say it while properly looking at you, so… Let me try this again: happy birthday, Tetora-kun…♪
With Hiiro Happy birthday, Buchou. You have so many of your companions here. I can tell that you're loved dearly, Buchou.
Ehehe, that's too kind of ya to say~ But it really feels nice to have your birthday celebrated, huh? Mm? Why're you starin' at me, Hiiro-kun?
Ah, I was concerned about you since our training in the gym, as you didn't seem at ease, but… I'm relieved to see that you're enjoying yourself now.
Ahaha, that's 'cuz I couldn't stop thinking 'bout how there's gonna be a party after we finished, so I was a li'l nervous. I wouldn't have been able to calm down if I was all on my own, actually. I'm real glad you were there with me, Hiiro-kun…♪
Birthday Cake Interactions List of office interactions that appear when the specified character gifts a present to Tetora.
I always hear so much about how hard you've been working!
Hehe, that makes me a li'l embarrassed to hear~
tetora's birthday party is so much fun~
Please enjoy yourself today!
This present is for you, Tetora-kun!
Ohh, thanks, Shinobu-kun!
Let's keep supporting each other, Tetora-kun.
'Course, I'd like that too!
I'd like to celebrate your birthday too, Buchou!
That makes me real happy, Hiiro-kun…♪
Please do use this for your daily skincare routine.
I'll be sure to use it tonight!
Tetsu, you've gotten manlier, haven'tcha?
Taishou…! I'm so happy you think so!
Tetora-chan, happy birthday~♪
Thanks, Harukawa-kun! ♪
I hope you have a fulfilling year, Tetsu-kun!
Imma work hard to become a man among men!
I made this for you, Nagumo-kun! ♪
Seriously!? For me!? I'm so happy!

entry.title: [ES!!] 2021 Tetora Nagumo Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Translation
310mc
Era
ES!! 2021
Birthday Quote
Thank you for celebratin' my birthday, Producer! I'll always be in your debt…! Is it alright if I check what you got me for a present? ♪
Birthday Event Event Preparations 1/3
Hello, Anzu-Anego, thank you for your hard work! You've got somethin' to talk to me 'bout, right? It's kinda refreshing to get a solo job, too… I'll do my absolute best, so! You can entrust me with anythin'!
You're so reliable.
It's my goal to become a man among men, after all! I'll always put my all in any job! But I dunno if I'll be able to do good on a job that needs thinking… If it's that sort of job, I'd like to think up plans with you!
Let's sit and talk about it.
Ah— Sorry! You're right, we can't relax if we talk while standing. I got too ahead of myself… Then please sit here, and I'll sit across from ya! I'd love to hear what you have in store for me!
It'll be a fun job.
A fun job… Will I get to move my body a lot? Like a sports variety show? Ah! Is that the planning you're holding? Show me, please!
2/3 So the job was 'bout my birthday event, huh? Shinobu-kun mentioned somethin' 'bout that, too. Shinobu-kun'd prolly do some ninja arts in his event, right? I'd love to do a fun event that's suitable for me, for the sake of everyone who came to see me!
What about a hero show?
I always do hero shows with everyone in Ryuseitai, but maybe a solo show where I fight against the kaijuu would be good. If we're gonna do one, I'd like to be sure how big the stage will be. I wanna do some super flashy, cool action moves…☆
How about displaying a karate move?
I don't get a lotta opportunities to show off my karate to my fans, so that sounds nice! There's somethin' captivating 'bout demonstrating martial arts moves that you won't get to see with kumite, so I'll show off my Karate Club Captain moves~♪
Let's make the segments fun.
The Question Segment and Request Segment, right? I'm so excited to see what sorta questions and requests I get~♪ I'll make sure to give everyone a taste of who I am so that I can make everyone happy!
3/3 Aight, we've got a good idea of what to do for the event. Thank you for taking the time out of your day for me, Anego! That said… Birthday events have a lot more thinking to do than I thought. They all sound like fun stuff to do, so I'm excited for the day, but… I'm a li'l worried I'll get too into it and forget what we've got planned.
Would you like cue cards?
While we could do that, I'd rather look at the audience during the event. I'll just make sure to remember everything before the day of the event! I wanna burn the image of everyone's fun, excited faces into my mind, after all…♪
You can get through it with ad-lib.
I could make things even more fun if I manage it…? So in other words, turning a predicament into an opportunity! I'm used to ad-lib through hero shows. If anything goes wrong, I'll manage through it so that I can heat up the crowd!
That's charming in its own way.
"I think your fans would love to see that side of you, too"…? I see, you could look at it that way, huh? I was really caught up with making sure I don't look lame, but… I'll only go in circles if I overthink it, so I'll just go with the usual me~♪
Opening Speech
Heya, everyone~! Thanks for coming to my birthday event! I've been so excited to see you guys ever since I heard 'bout this event! Actually, I checked the venue out from the curtains beforehand… And I could tell how you guys were so excited to meet me just through your expressions! It made me wanna get on stage already! But this isn't just gonna be for celebrating my birthday — I wanna make you all happy too, and have fun together! I thought up a lotta stuff for us~♪ Let's have a blast together 'til the very end~!
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Question Segment First up: the Question Segment! I'll answer all your questions. Ossu! First question: "What's the trick to being as energetic as you, Tetora-kun?" Hm, hm~ It's gotta be sleepin' early and wakin' up early! And eating lots! I know it sounds simple, but it's real important to stay energetic. Our health comes first! Next question: "What do you like to eat on your birthday?" Hmm… This is a tough one…! Uu~myu, I guess it'd be any meals with meat! A first-class kalbi that was grilled through the reddest flame is just perfect. I'm droolin' just at the thought…♪ Ah! But Midori-kun pointed out that all I'd been eating is kalbi… But let me off for my birthday at least — I'd love to eat my fav food on my birthday!
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Request Segment Next up is the Request Segment! I'll respond to your requests with all I've got~! This request says, "I'd love to do exercise with everyone"… Which sounds real fun, so! I'll teach you all a simple work-out exercise! This is simple enough to do at any time, so you could try it out whenever you have the time to spare, like on the train and stuff~ Let's start by standing up. Take a huge deep breath, then let your belly go back in… Yeah, yeah, just like that! C'mon, even if you're not used to working out, let's all build our bodies to be healthy and sound together…☆
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Surprise Segment The lights turning off was a real surprise~… I'm glad they came back on immediately. …Wait, huh? There's a cart outta nowhere. Wait, is this the surprise!? I guess I should open the present box on top…? Aight, here goes… This wrapping seems like clothes…? There's a letter with it too, who could've… Ahh~! This is Taishou's handwriting! So this is all from Taishou…!? Kuuh~! I'll treasure this for life! This is the best surprise I could ever have…!
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Closing Speech …I had a blast in this event, but it looks like it's time we say our goodbyes. Thanks a bunch for today, everyone. I had so much fun that it's bumming me out that it's all comin' to an end… But even if it is, the fun memories will still stay within me! I'll never forget today, so please don't forget 'bout it either, everyone! I'll work hard so we can have another celebration like this next year. 'Cuz I wanna show you all my manly, grown-up self after all my hard work. So I hope you can keep supporting me~♪ Ossu!
Birthday Cake

entry.title: [ES!!] 2022 Tetora Nagumo Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Translation
310mc
Era
ES!! 2022
Birthday Quote
Thank you, Producer! Whatcha think? Have I gotten closer to the image of a matured man?
Party with Everyone 1/3
I'm so excited for everyone to show up for my party~♪ Did you also prepare my birthday party, Anzu-Anego? Hehe, I'm super duper happy! Huh? Is that also for me…?
Could you take it?
Ooh, it's a teddy bear! It says "Happy birthday, Tetora"! Did you get this for me, Anzu-Anego? I'll gladly take it~♪
Could you clip this on your clothes?
A teddy bear? Ah, so I can clip this on my clothes, huh? Oh, I get it! Clipping this cute teddy bear is a mark of being a man among men! I'll totally clip it on!
2/3
There's a lotta food on the table~ Can I really eat this all? Aw yeah! I'm gonna eat all I want today~! What do you recommend, Anzu-Anego?
The barbeque.
You truly get me! I couldn't take my eyes off the plate of kalbi, y'know! Let's eat it together, if you're alright with that, Anzu-Anego! You can leave the grilling to me!
The steak.
Ooh, there's steak! It's pretty thick, so it should fill me up! I usually eat barbeque, but steak is nice too! I'll eat some~♪
3/3 Aight, it's 'bout time to call it a day. It's so much fun to have fun with everyone, the same way in a live. I know it won't be enough as repayment, but I wanna celebrate everyone's birthday with all I've got, too! Thank you so much for today, Anzu-Anego. I'll cherish this teddy bear, too~♪
I'm so glad you had fun.
Hehe! It's a party prepared by you, so 'course I'd have a blast! It's such a shame that it's coming to an end. But I'll keep workin' hard so that I can have another celebration like this next year!
Do you have any resolutions?
I'm aiming to be a man among men, as always, 'course! I'll do everything I can wherever I go for that sake, whether it's during a Ryuseitai live or in my Karate Club activities! …Well, I guess that's what I've always been doin', though. So please keep supporting me, Anzu-Anego!
Opening Speech
Heya everyone! Thanks for coming to my birthday party tonight! I've actually been real excited to see what sorta party is in store for me…♪ And so many people have come just to celebrate a big party for me… I'm so blessed! I want you all to enjoy yourselves to your heart's content! Ossu! Aight, let's get the party started~!
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Food Talk Tetsu-kun! Sorry for interrupting you while you're enjoying the savory meat, but — Happy birthday! ♪
Oooh! (munches, munches… gulps)! Thanks, Hinata-kun!
Ahaha, you're such a glutton~ But you're growing up, so how about you also eat some of that veggie you're not good with? Look, I brought one over!
Eugh!? N-No, anything but carrots~!
If you're aiming to be a man among men, then you should overcome your weaknesses! …Just kidding, this is actually a cake in the shape of a carrot. Try it out~
Huh!? Really? (munch, munch)… Mgh!? It really is a cake! And it's super tasty!
Ahaha, I gotcha good with this surprise! Happy birthday, Tetsu-kun…♪
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Presents from ES Idols This present is… Wha—!? It's the work-out gear I wanted!!
Happy birthday, Nagumo. Did you like HiMERU's present?
This is from you, HiMERU-san!? Thank you so much! ☆ But how'd you know I wanted this?
Fufu, it was a simple deduction. HiMERU saw that you threw away your broken work-out equipment, and then looked over options for the same equipment over and over again. Which can only mean one thing: You found something to replace your broken equipment, but you had still been hesitating whether to buy it.
Wooahh, you're amazing, HiMERU-san! That's incredible deduction skills! I'll make sure to repay you on your birthday!
Fufufu, HiMERU quite likes your sense of your duty. HiMERU is excited for that day. ♪
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Birthday Wishes from ES Idols Tetora-kun, happy birthday!
Nagumo-kun, happy birthday~! I'm so happy you're enjoying all the food we made!
Thank you, Shinobu-kun, Aniki! Wait, there's food you guys made!? Which one!?
That would be the sweets. I would love to see you try and figure out which ones we made…♪
If you figure it out, we'll give ya a grand prize~
Ooh, that's just how I like it! I'll make sure to get this right!
Hover/Click the chibi to see the quote! Closing Speech Time just passed after all the greetings, eating, and present opening… I'm sure some of you have work from the early morning, so it's 'bout time we call it a day. Right then… Thank you so much for making the time for me! I'm gonna keep growing stronger this year, both as an idol and as a man! ☆ So I hope you guys come celebrate my birthday next year, when I've grown even more! Aight, thank you for tonight! Ossu!
Birthday Special Motion
The special chibi motions for Tetora are Chiaki and Hiiro! ※ Special chibi motions show a different expression from the rest of the idols. Birthday Cake

entry.title: [ES!!] 2023 Tetora Nagumo Birthday
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Translation
310mc
Era
ES!! 2023
Birthday Quote
Ossu! I'm super thankful to hear those words from ya! I'm real happy, 'cuz growing older makes me feel like I'm getting a li'l bit closer to becoming a man among men! ♪
Birthday Moment Moment Event 1/3
Let me open HoldHands first… Okay, look over here, Tetora-kun!
Woah— Morisawa-senpai and Shinkai-senpai are dancing all of a sudden…!? Ahaha, they're yelling "happy birthday". Did they take this video for me?
That's an incredible birthday surprise!
Yeah… They weren't sure if they could make it to your party 'cause of work, so they came up with this idea for you… It's crazy how fast they are to take action…
Woah, I seriously didn't expect this at all! I'm real happy~♪
Happy birthday.
Thank you, Anego! ♪ Hehe! It feels real nice to have my birthday celebrated by you and my seniors…♪
2/3 Oh yeah, Anzu-san — Are you here to take Tetora-kun to his party?
Huh? But wasn't my birthday party gonna start a li'l later? Ohh… You wanna see me after the party's over? Gotcha!
I'm excited.
Ossu! I'm super excited for it too, Anego~♪ I don't have anythin' to do after the party, so I'll be waiting for ya!
It'll be pretty late at night, sorry.
I don't mind at all~♪ If anything, I'd like to thank you in advance for all your hard work! Where will we meet? I'll work out a li'l at the meeting spot 'til you come!
3/3 Oh yeah, I should thank Morisawa-senpai and Shinkai-senpai for the video!
Then, what say you take a video for them, Tetora-kun?
Ohh, good idea… I'd like to do more than just thank 'em, then…
How about the three of you take a video together?
Fweh—!? Where'd this come from…!? D-Do I seriously have to do it, too…?
I won't force ya, but I'd love it if you did, Midori-kun! C'mon, please? ♪
How about you dance for yours, too?
That sounds like a great idea! I'll show my gratitude through a dance! I'll need to go to the dance room first, then. Aight, I'll see you later~♪
Birthday Night, Part One 1/3
Oh! Anego, 'suup~! Thank you for your hard work today! You don't have to apologize for being late. I was workin' out 'til you arrived. And now I feel super refreshed after taking a shower! ♪
You were working out even on your birthday?
Yup! It's best to get my muscles moving every day! Plus, I ate a lotta food today, so I gotta burn all those calories away!
2/3 Thanks for preparing my birthday party! I heard the work was split between people for the decorations, the cake, and all that. I'm real happy everyone did that for me! Please let me help out on their birthdays, too!
That makes me happy to hear.
'Course I'd help, y'know! You can always ask me for any sorta help. Leave all the manual labor to me! I'll do my best with cooking, too~♪
3/3 I got lotsa presents at my birthday party~♪ Not only from Ryuseitai, but even from my circle members Hiiro-kun and Taishou! They gave me stuff for working out, and even clothes~♪ I'm so excited to try 'em out!
Did anything else happen?
Hmm… I got a present from Saegusa-senpai too, as part of Ibara Lecture. It was basically a review worksheet of all the mistakes I did on the last test… He told me to make sure to complete it before the next session.
Birthday Night, Part Two 1/3 Huh!? You got me a present, too!? Thank you! Ohh, a brooch! It really stands out from its size~ Mm, I don't typically wear brooches, so I don't really know where best to clip it on… Where do you usually use it?
On shawls and such.
Ohh! That's right, I remember Narukami-senpai using a brooch like that before! I'll ask Narukami-senpai or HiMERU-san a whole lotta other ways I could use it once I get back to the dorms!
2/3
I don't have a shawl with me right now, so I just clipped it on my clothes~♪ Hehe! Thank you, I'm real happy to know it suits me~♪ I got lotsa different presents today, but a brooch is a first time for me. I feel like I got to end tonight with the most glittering present~♪
I'm glad you like it.
I'd have been happy with anythin' from you, Anzu-Anego! ♪ Oh, that only makes you less sure what to get me next time…? Uu~myu, but it's how I really feel…
3/3 Thank you again for today. Even Morisawa-senpai and Shinkai-senpai came to my party despite their busy schedules…! It was real lively with so many people 'round. But that ended up makin' me cut my time short with talking to everyone in Ryuseitai, and I feel like it's a shame… Ahaha… Maybe you're right, Anego — Maybe I'm feeling a li'l sad that today has reached its end…
(Calls on the phone)
Hm? What're you doing…? Huh!? Everyone from Ryuseitai is still at the agency's office…!? Thanks for letting me know, Anego! I'm off to see 'em before the day ends!
Birthday Phone Call I was still feelin' too giddy after my birthday party, so I had to call you at least once, Anego…♪ …It was fun for you, too? Hehe, I'm so glad to hear that! Let's continue to enjoy our daily lives together!
Birthday Cake
